news.title: Vanguard Announces Cash Distributions for the Vanguard ETFs
news.description: Vanguard Investments Canada Inc. announced final June 2026 cash distributions for eight TSX-listed ETFs. Unitholders of record on June 26, 2026 will receive distributions on July 6, 2026, with per-unit amounts ranging from $0.22 to $0.40 across various index-tracking and dividend appreciation funds.
